title: Candabrine Bu

{{Quote|Palpatine has never been behind the Military Creation Act, and was ready to stall it when the leader of the opposition appeared to be dead. Would he have done so if it was a pro-military Senator who was killed? And when she showed up alive, he postpones the vote anyway. I seriously doubt whether he had intended for the vote to pass today at all.|Candabrine Bu|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Candabrine Bu''' was a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Homeworld/Legends|hailing]] from the celestial body [[Lansono]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. A [[Militarists/Legends|militarist]], the Lansono senator supported the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]], which aimed to create an [[Army/Legends|army]] to assist the beleaguered [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. When [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] postponed the Senate vote on the act following an [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|assassination attempt]] on Senator [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Bu publicly criticized the chancellor for using the situation to thwart the passage of the act.

==Biography==
Candabrine Bu lived during the [[Great Peace of the Republic|reign]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and [[Homeworld|hailed]] from the celestial body [[Lansono]].<ref name="CSWE" /> By [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|news/13516_1.html|BREAKING NEWS: Amidala Alive / BREAKING NEWS: Amidala Attacked}} is set on the date [[Great ReSynchronization|13:5:16]], which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> they represented Lansono as a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the Republic's [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].<ref name="HNN" /> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="Date" /> during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], the Senate was debating the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]]—a piece of legislation that, if passed, would authorize the creation of an [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Army of the Republic]].<ref name="MCA">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|news/1337_1.html|Palpatine Sets Army Vote Date}}</ref> As a [[Militarists/Legends|pro-military]] senator, Bu was among the supporters of the motion.<ref name="HNN" />

[[File:WakeUpSenators-AotCDVD.jpg|thumb|right|400px|Padmé Amidala speaking in the Senate against the Military Creation Act, a piece of legislation that Candabrine Bu supported.]]
On [[Great ReSynchronization|13:5:16]]—the date upon which the Military Creation Act was to be brought before the Senate for a vote<ref name="MCA" />—Bu and other proponents of the bill were prepared to cast their ballots when word reached the Senate of an [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|assassination attempt]] on Senator [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], a vehement opponent of the act. Amidala was believed [[Death/Legends|dead]] in the attack, and, to allow for a period of mourning for the senator's passing, [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] delayed the vote on the act until the following [[Standard day/Legends|day]]. However, Amidala was alive, and her sudden appearance before her peers in the midst of the chancellor's makeshift eulogy served to dispel any rumors of her death. Palpatine ultimately decided to postpone the vote anyway, which angered a number of pro-military senators, including Bu.<ref name="HNN" />

Following the session, the Lansono senator spoke to [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] in an interview for [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition]], conveying the militarists' frustration over the day's events and accusing the chancellor of exploiting the [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] attempt on Amidala to derail the act.<ref name="HNN" /> Ultimately, though the Senate never voted on the the legislation, a centralized Republic [[Army/Legends|army]] was formed by Palpatine following the Senate granting him emergency powers to counter the threat of [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]] from the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="AOTC">{{Film|II}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
A militarist, Senator Bu sought to authorize the reestablishment of the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic Military]] at the height of the Separatist Crisis. When Palpatine postponed the vote on the Military Creation Act following the believed death of Amidala, a leading member of the opposition to the legislation, Bu took to the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] to accuse the Chancellor of trying to undermine the militarists and sabotage the act.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Candabrine Bu was first mentioned in "BREAKING NEWS: Amidala Alive," an article<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 56|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #56]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[May 16]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN56 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6873383|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=ForceAlly|date=2002-05-16|time=5:34 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref>
